original_statement: what was the total number of medals earned by china (chn)?
mutated_statement: what was the total number of something experienced by that side?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + noun vagueness + verb replacement + abbreviation deletion: country name generalized to a vague referent | "medals" replaced by vague "something" | verb "earned" changed to "experienced" | parenthetical "(chn)" removed (china (chn) → that side | medals → something | earned → experienced | (chn) → —)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据iteration 0的judge_thought和chain可见信息：judge_thought直接说明“表格最后一行total...总数为721”，并写道“如果‘that side’指整体总和，则正确答案是721”。agent在chain中通过select_column和simple_query直接选取并返回721，未提出澄清问题或表达不确定性。综上，agent把模糊的“that side/something/experienced”视为明确的“total medals earned by all countries”，没有识别或声明问题的歧义，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
